The '''JV-71 ion engine''' was an [[Ion engine/Legends|engine]] designed by [[Novaldex/Legends|Novaldex]]. A vector-redirecting engine, the JV-71 provided agility without sacrificing interior system space. It was installed in standard models of the [[Starfeld Industries/Legends|Starfeld Industries]] [[Z-10 Seeker-class scout ship|Z-10 ''Seeker''-class scout ship]].

{{Tech-stub}}
